name: aurora-combobox
title: Aurora Combobox
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Searchable selection control for large option sets like gateways, models, branches, and files.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/combobox.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-search-results`.
